title: malva rotundifolia var. pusilla
intro: Malva rotundifolia var. pusilla, also known as dwarf mallow, is a variety of the Malva rotundifolia plant, belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae), native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Malva rotundifolia var. pusilla include soothing sore throats, relieving coughs, and calming digestive issues, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
